title: Credit Card Payoff With $200 Extra Payment — TheDailyo
h1: Credit Card Payoff With $200 Extra Payment
subtitle: See how adding $200/month changes payoff time and interest.
description: Calculate how an extra $200 monthly payment affects your credit card payoff timeline, interest paid, and total cost.
howItWorksHtml: This page pre-fills an extra $200/month. Paying more than the minimum can dramatically reduce both payoff time and total interest.

faq.q: What if I can only do $200 extra temporarily?
faq.a: Even a temporary boost can help. Try it for a few months, then reduce it and compare results.

faq.q: Will this eliminate debt faster than snowball/avalanche?
faq.a: Strategy affects which debts you pay first; extra payment affects how much you pay. Combining both is often best.

faq.q: Does this include balance transfer promos?
faq.a: No—promo APR periods and fees aren’t included. Use this as a baseline estimate.

affiliate.headline: Lower your APR and pay off faster
